steps.title: Find the size detail
steps.content: The student's goal is to indicate the size of the Kohana Marsh NWR. The only note that gives a size is that the refuge encompasses 61 acres, so the sentence must include that measurement.

steps.title: Exclude unrelated facts
steps.content: B focuses on management and activity limits, C focuses on the Hawaiian stilt, and D combines the species with the management agency. None of those states the refuge's size. The answer is A.
